place_results.title: Century Medical & Dental Center
place_results.hours_last_updated: Confirmed by this business 2 weeks ago

posts.description:
Same- or Next-Day Medical Care in Midtown Manhattan

Need a medical visit near Midtown West or Hell’s Kitchen? Century Medical & Dental Center offers same- or next-day appointments at our Midtown Manhattan office at 827 11th Ave, near West 57th Street.
Patients can be seen for routine checkups, urgent concerns, annual physicals, screenings, follow-up visits, medication questions, and specialty care. In-person and online doctor visits may be available.
For over 25 years, our board-certified doctors have provided trusted care for Manhattan families and professionals. The office is easily accessible from the 1/2 trains at 59 St-Columbus Circle and the A/C/E trains at 50 Street, near Lincoln Center, MoMA, Hudson River Park, and Columbus Circle.
Most insurance plans accepted, including Medicaid and Medicare.

Learn more: https://www.centurymedicaldental.com/midtown-manhattan-ny-10019/

Patients with skin irritation, rashes, or changes in skin appearance may be evaluated at Century Medical & Dental Center through a focused dermatologic assessment. Evaluation may include clinical examination and diagnostic review to identify underlying skin conditions and guide appropriate care. Services are provided within a dermatology-focused setting addressing a range of skin concerns. Located on 11th Ave in Hell’s Kitchen near Hudson Yards and accessible via the 7 train, the clinic is convenient for local patients. Findings from evaluation may help improve skin comfort and clarity. Contact the office to arrange a consultation. Medicaid and Medicare accepted.
Learn More: https://www.centurymedicaldental.com/specialties/dermatologist/

Gastroenterology Care in Midtown West – 10019!
Century Medical & Dental Center provides comprehensive gastroenterology services at our 11th Ave location in Midtown West. Our team evaluates digestive concerns including acid reflux, abdominal discomfort, and preventive GI screening with personalized care and ongoing management.
Conveniently located for patients in Hell’s Kitchen, Hudson Yards, and the Columbus Circle area within a short walking or transit radius.
We accept a wide range of insurance plans, including Medicaid and Medicare.
Learn more: https://www.centurymedicaldental.com/specialties/gastroenterologist/

Internal Medicine Care in Midtown West
At Century Medical & Dental Center, our internal medicine physicians provide comprehensive adult care, including preventive checkups and management of chronic conditions. We focus on accurate diagnosis, continuity of care, and long-term health planning.
Conveniently located near Hell’s Kitchen, Hudson Yards, and Midtown West.
Learn more: https://www.centurymedicaldental.com/specialties/internal-medicine-doctor/

summary.snippet: "Clean clinic, great location,nice atmosphere, good staff, professional doctors."
"Came in and declined service because they overbook incase people cancel."
"Great office, clean rooms, professional staff and nice front desk 👌🏻"

most_relevant.description: I first was attended by Iryna at the front with a welcoming greeting and quick sign in. Within less than 5 minutes I was called in and had a great experience with both the medical assistant and attending doctors. They were very attentive to my specific situation and diligent with examining me fully. They’re detailed and helpful. Very informative as to the results and what was the best treatments moving forward. At the end of my visit I was met by Crystal whom attentively provided me with documentation and informatively explained next steps with a polite and proactive approach. In total I spent less than 25mins at the location. I’m definitely coming back.

I honestly have to say that Century Medical & Dental on 11th Avenue is one of the best clinics I’ve ever been to in my life. From the moment you walk in, the entire staff makes you feel welcomed and respected. The front desk team is professional, helpful, and always organized. The MAs are caring, patient, and attentive, and the doctors truly take their time with you and make you feel comfortable.

It’s very rare nowadays to find a clinic where the entire staff works together so professionally while still making patients feel like family. The office is clean, efficient, and the level of care they provide is outstanding. I highly recommend Century Medical & Dental to anyone looking for quality medical care with people who genuinely care about their patients. Thank you to everyone at the 827 11th Avenue location for always being amazing!

I had the absolute best experience with Dr. Yana! She’s incredibly knowledgeable, compassionate, and took the time to truly listen and explain everything clearly. The office is spotless, modern, and welcoming, and the manager went out of her way to make everything run smoothly and feel so personal. Highly recommend—5 stars all the way!

Dr Tkachenko is terrific. She is patient, caring, and thorough. And she provides a comprehensive view of your overall health. I have been with Dr Tkachenko for a while now, and deeply appreciate the care she provides during each visit. Recently, I had a sports injury to my right knee. Dr Tkachenko examined it carefully and checked to see if there was accumulation of fluids. She suggested a few ways to care for it, and how to observe the progress in terms of recovery. Very fortunate to have Dr Tkachenko as my primary care physician. Best wishes for Dr Tkachenko and Century Medical and Dental Center!

I visited Century Medical & Dental for the second time today and am impressed with the level of care I received there.  Dr. Natalya Tkachenko is really nice and has a calm bedside manner, and made me feel safe and cared for when she discussed my healthcare concerns.  You can tell she genuinely cares about her patients, and her medical assistant Aya and front desk staff are very helpful and professional.
They take my insurance, Metroplus Health, and have a lot of different specialists available.  I got my vaccinations and a vitamin B-12 shot today, I also have an allergist appointment and podiatrist appointment soon - it makes it easy for me to meet my healthcare needs when they're all located at the same office.
Thanks Dr. Natalya and Century Medical & Dental!!

Dr. Brojic and his Assistant Soleh are amazing. Their vibe is infectious (no pun intended) and make you feel welcomed. The location is very clean. The only downside is the phone service. There is one specific phone individual who may be Russian not exactly sure who she is, but she’s very rude. They continually put you on hold and hang up on patients. It’s as if the patient is a burden. If they could just match the energy of the staff at the 827 location they would easily have a  considerable amount of happy patients.

Take the reviews about their dental department seriously (I can’t speak for medical).

1). I called the dental department in November to cancel a cleaning and rescheduled for March. All good. Since rescheduling, my insurance info has changed. I called the office to confirm that my dentist accepts my new insurance and the receptionist told me “this dentist has not worked here in over a year.” Hmm. If he hasn’t worked there in over a year, why wasn’t I told that when rescheduling my appointment back in November? It’s March.

2). I asked the receptionist to confirm if my new insurance would be accepted at that office for my upcoming appointment and she told me that there was no record of any future appointments for me. Hmm. She asked me to hold and then left me on hold for 20 minutes before transferring me to leave a voicemail. My patience was shot by the unprofessionalism so I decided then to make an appointment at a different office.

3). After not hearing back from the office post-voicemail, I called the following afternoon. The same receptionist picked up my call. I asked her to confirm whether or not I had an appointment scheduled in March and that I needed to cancel it regardless. She hung up on me. I called again and reached a nice enough gentleman who assured me that I did not have any future appointments scheduled.

I’m glad I called before showing up to the  office the day of my appointment (or what I thought was my appointment). But I am very frustrated by the extreme lack of professionalism by the front desk. Making an appointment months ahead (because apparently their hygienist is only there once a month???) to then find out the appointment was never entered into their system. Never bothered to contact me when my dentist supposedly left the office over a year ago (gee, I wonder why). Find somewhere else (preferably somewhere that sends you appointment confirmation).

Over the years I’ve had the privilege of working with exceptional professionals across many fields, so I don’t use praise lightly. From the moment I walked in, Soleh A. created an immediate sense of calm and trust. The intention, precision, and genuine care that Soleh A. and Dr. Bogdan Brajic bring to their work is something you feel right away.

A previous filling done elsewhere had been left improperly contoured, creating a shelf that trapped food and bacteria. Dr. Bogdan Brajic recognized it instantly and took the time to carefully refine and correct it. Not only did the tooth look significantly better, it resolved an issue that could have developed into something far more serious.

When Dr. Bogdan Brajic completed my own fillings, the level of precision was remarkable. The color match was flawless and the shaping so meticulous you simply cannot tell any work was ever done. Throughout the entire process, Soleh A. and Dr. Bogdan Brajic made sure I was completely comfortable.

In a world where true craftsmanship and genuine care are increasingly rare, I am deeply grateful for Soleh A. and Dr. Bogdan Brajic. If you have the option, ask for Dr. Bogdan Brajic. You’ll understand why the moment you sit in the chair.
